name: Campus Note 14
shortSummary: Affordable everyday laptop for notes, browsing, and light schoolwork.
longDescription:
Campus Note 14 is an entry-level laptop focused on value, durability for daily carry, and enough performance for documents, presentations, and web-based apps. It is designed for students and casual users who do not need workstation or gaming hardware.

Specifications:
- CPU: Efficient 6-core mobile processor
- RAM: 8 GB (soldered)
- Storage: 256 GB SSD
- Display: 14-inch IPS, 1920x1080
- Battery life: up to 10 hours for light office and video streaming
- Weight: 1.5 kg

It handles word processing, spreadsheets, video calls, and many browser tabs comfortably. Light coding in small projects or introductory courses is possible, though large solutions or heavy compilation will feel slow.

The chassis and port selection are practical: enough USB ports for accessories and an HDMI output for classroom projectors. The display is adequate for reading and writing but is not factory-calibrated for professional color work.

Limitations include modest RAM that cannot be upgraded on this configuration and no discrete GPU, so gaming, 3D, and heavy video editing are not recommended. Storage is smaller than premium models; external drives help for large media libraries.

Campus Note 14 is best for budget-conscious buyers who need reliable mobility and everyday productivity without premium creative or gaming features.
